de.name: Tägliches Finanz-Briefing
de.description: Finanz-Tagesbriefing — Mahnstufen, OPOS, Skonto-Fristen, Liquidität, USt — täglich um 07:00.

prefill.name: Tägliches Finanz-Briefing
prefill.description: 3-4 wichtigsten Finanz-Themen für den Tag — Mahnungen, OPOS, Skonto, Liquidität.

angles: Skonto-Fristen (Eingangsrechnungen mit ziehbarem Skonto in 1-3 Tagen)
Finanz-Agent-Jobs in requires_intervention (Mahnvorschlag-Generator, Eingangsrechnung-Capture, Bank-Recon, OPOS-Auswerter hängen)

en.name: Daily Finance Briefing
en.description: Finance daily briefing — dunning levels, open items, cash discount deadlines, liquidity, VAT — every day at 07:00.

prefill.name: Daily Finance Briefing
prefill.description: Top 3-4 finance topics for today — dunning, open items, cash discount, liquidity.

angles: Dunning levels 1/2/3 (which debtors at which level)
Open items list (top overdue receivables + payables)
Cash-discount deadlines (incoming invoices with discount available within 1-3 days)
VAT advance return & other fiscal deadlines (seasonal)
Finance agent jobs in requires_intervention (Dunning Proposal Generator, Incoming Invoice Capture, Bank Recon, Open Items Analyzer stuck)
